title: Cults
description: Start cults and work with blood related technology.
body:
Cults is a magi-tech mod using gore as a source of power. 
  Start by collecting organs from Chickens, Cows, Sheep, Pigs, and Zombies. Use the organs to create a flesh block, to create a "Cultist Creed," an item used to create or disband cults and invite new members. 
  
  ![Recipe](https://i.imgur.com/szYvgt0.png)
  Recipe uses cults:#organs item tag.

 

  To begin with the machinery, start by squishing organs and or flesh blocks into the "Squisher"

  Each organ provides 200 mL of blood while each flesh block provides 18000 mL


  Commands (Operator only)

    /cult create example Example
    /cult destroy example
    /cult view example

 

Requires Fabric API, Trinkets, and Cardinal Components
